Thanks for chatting! You get 1 points and now you have a total of 1.
I will have to go. Something has come up sorry. Get well soon. We will be in touch!
@neuwonder The job market over here in Canada is also just as bad; I lost my job at the start of the year and have been hunting for a while.
I'm doing alright, thank you for asking.
@PretentiousFroslass I know, I live here... I'm at least thankful I have a job.
I am thankful I have employment insurance, and it gets me enough to go around (and treat myself every once in a while)
That having been said, I am planning just because I know it will not last forever
It was, however, a thrill to see myself appear in a movie that is uniting people across Canada and the United States rn
@PretentiousFroslass Yeah, considering the relatively recent divisions happening these days.
